heading: Omitted

notes: CodificationSection, , , , which related to distribution of shares of deceased enrollees and minors or persons under legal disabilities, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 90–114, § 381 Stat. 335Oct. 24, 1967
